title: stellaria dichotoma f. lanceolata
intro: Stellaria dichotoma f. lanceolata, also known as lesser chickweed or starwort, is a flowering plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is commonly found in temperate regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stellaria dichotoma f. lanceolata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or salves, often used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
